mapper.select: SELECT balance_after FROM deposit_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND currency = 'KRW' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deposit_transactions (user_id, account_id, tx_type, amount, currency, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{txType}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{idempotencyKey})
